name: ai-ready-suite
description: AI Ready Suite — Design system AI readiness assessment, audit, and library scout.

scripts.postinstall: cd mcp-servers/ai-ready-engine && npm install && npm run build:all
scripts.testAll: node test/run-assessment.js && node test/integration-test.js && node test/run-interaction.js && npx jest --verbose
scripts.build:publish: npm run build && rm -rf publish && mkdir -p publish/.codex-plugin publish/.market-assets publish/skills publish/mcp-servers/ai-ready-engine/dist publish/mcp-servers/ai-ready-engine/schema publish/examples && cp .codex-plugin/plugin.json .codex-plugin/icon.svg publish/.codex-plugin/ 2>/dev/null; cp .mcp.json publish/ && cp -r skills/ai-ready-suite publish/skills/ && cp -r mcp-servers/ai-ready-engine/dist/* publish/mcp-servers/ai-ready-engine/dist/ && cp -r mcp-servers/ai-ready-engine/schema/* publish/mcp-servers/ai-ready-engine/schema/ && cp mcp-servers/ai-ready-engine/package.json publish/mcp-servers/ai-ready-engine/ && cp README.md README.en.md QUICKSTART.md QUICKSTART.en.md LICENSE version.json CHANGELOG.md publish/ && cp -r examples/* publish/examples/ && cp .market-assets/*.png publish/.market-assets/ 2>/dev/null; node test/publish-verify.js && echo '✅ Publish directory ready: publish/'
scripts.prepare-market: npm run build:publish && echo '📦 Market package ready at publish/. To create a git-safe market repo: cp -r publish/* /path/to/market-repo/'

author: 想象一片森林
